prompt: Please run one Phase 55 Windows Computer Use out-of-process native helper v2 acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command. Do not install dependencies, do not change registry, do not change Windows settings, do not click the real desktop, do not move the mouse, and do not type into any other real window. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE55_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_V2_READY. You must call the terminal tool and run this safe verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use.native_helper_v2 import main; raise SystemExit(main())" Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE55_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_V2_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE55_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_V2_READY PHASE55_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_V2_OK process_started=true health=true messages=true timeout_handled=true crash_handled=true send_input_refused=true raw_text_hidden=true actions_expanded=false
